task_completion.description: Load the sample polygon and point layers into QGIS
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main QGIS window, the Layers panel should list 'sample_polygon' and 'sample_points', and the map canvas should display polygons and points.

task_completion.description: Create a new print layout named 'Sample Data Map'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A separate QGIS Print Layout window should be open. The title bar of this window should indicate the layout name 'Sample Data Map'.

task_completion.description: Add a map item to the layout showing both layers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The print layout canvas should contain a map frame displaying the loaded polygons (2 areas) and points (3 points).

task_completion.description: Add the specific title to the layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text label containing exactly 'San Francisco Bay Area - GIS Sample Data' must be visible on the print layout.

task_completion.description: Add a north arrow, scale bar, and legend to the layout
task_completion.visual_evidence: The print layout must visually include a north arrow graphic, a scale bar (showing distances), and a legend item listing the point and polygon layers.

task_completion.description: Export the layout as a PDF to the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export to PDF' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sample_map.pdf', a QGIS success notification for the PDF export, or a file manager window showing 'sample_map.pdf' in the exports folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS graphical user interface to create the layout and export the PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGIS desktop application and Print Layout windows being actively used, rather than terminal commands executing PyQGIS scripts or ImageMagick commands to fake a PDF.

integrity.description: The map layout displays the actual provided GeoJSON data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map frame in the layout should show the specific 2 polygons and 3 points from the sample data, not a blank map, a generic basemap without the data, or an imported static image.

integrity.description: The PDF was generated using the QGIS layout export function.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the QGIS 'Export as PDF' icon being clicked or the specific QGIS PDF export options dialog, ensuring the file wasn't just a renamed text file or created via a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The polygon layer contains exactly 2 features (Area A, Area B) and the point layer contains exactly 3 features (Point A, Point B, Point C). The layout window title must be 'Sample Data Map'. The title label on the map must be exactly 'San Francisco Bay Area - GIS Sample Data'. The final export path must be '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/sample_map.pdf'.
